headline: Invesco Ltd. to Participate in the Morgan Stanley U.S. Financials Conference
summary: Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ), a leading global asset management firm, announced today that Allison Dukes, Chief Financial Officer, will participate in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley U.S. Financials Conference at 10:30 a.m. ET Wednesday, June 10, 2026.

headline: Invesco Completes Canadian Fund Sale as CI GAM Expands Scale
summary: IVZ completes transfer of the C$27B Canadian fund business to CI GAM, while retaining portfolio roles on 61 funds through a long-term partnership.
